text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Modification of a sensitive system control registry key (MiniNt) via reg.exe, which can alter system boot or recovery behavior.",
  "indicators": [
    "reg.exe",
    "REG ADD",
    "HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\\SYSTEM\\ControlSet001\\Control\\MiniNt",
    "MiniNt",
    "reg_create",
    "reg_set"
  ]
}
